content_body:
Nothing adds an extra spark to a relationship than a romantic mountain getaway to Blue Ridge, GA. Just a short 90-minute drive north from Atlanta, you're in a mountain paradise with all the ingredients to sizzle and add sparkle to your relationship. We have compiled some ideas that couples enjoy doing while in Blue Ridge.

The beautiful mountain scenery and small mountain town vibe provides the perfect backdrop for adding some sizzle to your relationship. Still, not everyone has the same idea about the ideal romantic getaway. Some love outdoor adventures, others love the food and drink scene, and others enjoy the arts and entertainment scene. 

However, you and yours may enjoy experiencing every bit of what Blue Ridge offers. We have put together a couples guide for the perfect activities to experience while on your mountain getaway.

Outdoor Adventures

Take a hike to an incredibly gorgeous waterfall and feel like you're a million miles away. Long Creek Falls is one of the most popular because it is close to our cabins Serendipity on Noontootla Creek and Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek. Plus, it is a scenic section of the Appalachian Trail which starts just 4 miles away at Springer Mountain. 

For the thrill seekers whitewater rafting, ziplining, tubing the Toccoa River, or accomplishing a challenging obstacle course can all be experienced at Ocoee Rafting in conjunction with Zipline Canopy Tours and Blue Ridge Adventure Park.

Rent a pontoon boat from Blue Ridge Boat Rentals and enjoy a leisurely day on the crystal clear turquoise waters of Lake Blue Ridge. With over 100 miles of mostly undisturbed national forest shoreline, the beauty of this lake is unsurpassed. Pack a picnic and pull off into the many coves and inlets and share some quiet togetherness on the water.

Great Places to Eat and Drink in Blue Ridge

Blue Ridge is a foodie haven for gourmet enthusiasts. Offering foodie fare from Italy, Germany, Cuba to grass-fed beef, farm-to-table, fresh seafood, there is truly something to delight even the most discerning palate. For a fine dining experience, Ferraro's Kitchen delivers incredible Italian food ~ the perfect ingredients for a romantic date night. For a casual night out, Cucina Rustica is a popular hang-out located in nearby Morganton, just a 10 minute drive away.

For the sweet tooth, Mona Lisa's Dessert House is the rave along with Sweet Shoppe of the South, 2014 winner of Cupcake Wars on Food Network. 

For wine lovers, The Vine Bar & Bistro is perfect for small eats and drinks in Downtown Blue Ridge. For a more laid-back atmosphere with live music, check the several microbreweries in Downtown - Grumpy Old Men, Angry Hops, and Tipping Point Brewery, to name a few that are close together. 

Blue Ridge Arts and Entertainment

Blue Ridge, GA has been named one of the top art communities in the country. The Blue Ridge Mountains Art Association provides many artful opportunities in Blue Ridge to satisfy those with a bent towards the arts, whether painting, quilting, writing, crafting, and so much more. Presenting two major art festivals each year, Arts in the Park is hugely popular with both locals and tourists. During Plein Air events, the countryside of Blue Ridge and the North GA Mountains are dotted with artists and their easels and paints capturing the most beautiful landscape in the Southeast. 

Drawing from local talent in Blue Ridge and beyond, The Blue Ridge Community Theatre puts on incredible live plays that run for several weekends. Selling out crowds is not uncommon because the talent is THAT good! 

Throughout Downtown Blue Ridge, many venues provide live music for their patrons as they eat and sip making the nightlife in Blue Ridge a happening place. 

Romantic Blue Ridge Cabin Rentals


Cohutta Sunset

Perhaps the best thing for a romantic mountain getaway with the one you love is a cozy cabin. Snuggle up to a crackling wood-burning fireplace with a bottle of wine, soak in a hot tub under a canopy of stars, or sit in front of a blazing fire pit breathing in fresh mountain air and reveling in nature's beauty. Finally, retire to a decked out bedroom with plush mattresses and linens.

Check out our favorite romantic cabins for your Blue Ridge mountain getaway: Cohutta Sunset, Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek, Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary.
title: Romantic Things to Do for Couples in Blue Ridge
